episodes.title: Jeffrey Epstein's Final Hours and the Truth Behind the Case | Conspiracies & Coverups | Discovery
episodes.description:
Former CIA intelligence officer Andrew Bustamante investigates the mysterious case surrounding Jeffrey Epstein’s final hours through reconstructed prison cell footage, forensic autopsy analysis, and testimony from a fellow inmate about conditions inside the Metropolitan Correctional Center.
#Discovery #ConspiraciesandCover-Ups
